subcodes.first_line: O kind friend! Thy letter hath arrived, and from the glad-tidings of the attraction of the hearts of the beloved ones, utmost joy was obtained [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار مهربان نامه رسید و از بشارت انجذاب قلوب احباء نهایت مسرت حاصل گردید
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @laws of marriage and dowry, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @praise and encouragement
